content.en:
"Father, here to comprehend, the efficiency of my comprehension of the third sequence of supreme path rules has increased many times!!!

Ye Xingchen was shocked.

You must know that if you don't use the third sequence of supreme path rule items, there is almost no reaction to the third sequence of supreme path rules in normal times, and even if you comprehend one hundred thousand supreme dao epochs and one million solstice dao eras, there is not much progress.

But here it is different, and you can clearly sense the slightest improvement.

"This is the Realm of Miluo!" Ye Tian introduced: "You are here to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao, and the speed of progress is far beyond the outside world, if you are here to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao, the effect will far surpass the outside world." It may be that a Supreme Rule item is equivalent to dozens of times the effect of the outside world. "

"It's incredible!"

Ye Xingchen was shocked.

Immediately, he asked, "Father, the Miluo Domain is so big, can it allow many people to establish enlightenment without affecting the effect of enlightenment?"

Ye Tiandao: "It is okay to enter the Dao realm in large quantities, it will not affect the effect of enlightenment, and only need to supply energy." But for the time being, no one outside of you can come in and come in, not even your children. "

"Why?" Ye Xingchen asked.

Ye Tian said helplessly: "Because the Miluo Domain is too incredible, for an individual, it is nothing, but for a force, its value is unimaginable. If such a Miluo Domain is allowed to continue to be cultivated by a force, after a long time, how many legends will have to be cultivated to the Dao Realm??? and even some more Patriarchs will be cultivated! Therefore, once the Miluo Domain is exposed, even if the thousand and thirty-six Elders will not forcibly snatch it, it will be recommended to let the Superior Dao Realm of other forces enter here to comprehend. In that case, the Terrans won't be able to gain an advantage!"

"Father, I understand!"

Ye Xingchen nodded.

The strength of the human race is not enough now, and it is difficult to keep such a Miluo domain, and only after his father's strength is stronger and he is not afraid of other patriarchs can he announce the Miluo domain.

"So, for the time being, if you are cultivating here, I will prepare some Supreme Dao Rule items for you, especially Xingchen, as soon as possible, comprehend the third sequence of Supreme Dao rules to the Consummation Realm, and I will give you a legendary spiritual object, so that you can break through to the Mythical Dao Realm and become a patriarch. Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, father!"

Ye Xingchen was excited.

In the years that followed, Ye Xingchen and the others were here to comprehend the rules of the Dao.

And Ye Tian also got them some high-quality, top-quality third-order supreme rule items and fourth-order supreme rule items, but he managed to erase the cost of their side effects.

Gradually, their realm of supreme rules continued to improve.

After a long time.

Ye Xingyue and Xiao Yue comprehended the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the Consummation Realm, and with the help of a Third Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, they comprehended the Third Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

Theoretically, the ordinary legend to the Dao realm that comprehends the rules of the third sequence to the Dao is also expected to break through to the mythical Dao realm, but the probability is relatively low, and it is best to comprehend the rules of the third sequence to the Dao realm of more than seventy percent, so that there is a great chance of breakthrough.

So, they continued to meditate.

Anyway, there was the existence of the Miluo Domain, and Ye Tian continued to provide various third-order supreme rule items, which was enough to ensure that they could comprehend the third-order supreme rule to a very high level.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also took out the innate primordial treasure of the Divine Qiongzhu and asked Ye Xingchen and the three of them to use it separately to improve their cultivation, and strive to raise their cultivation to the peak of the legendary Dao realm as soon as possible.

That is, Ye Tiancai is willing to take out the innate original treasure for his family to use, if it is replaced by someone else, he will not dare to leak it, for fear of exposure.

Before you know it, the years of the Millions of Solstices have passed.

At this time.

Ye Xingchen has already elevated his cultivation to the peak of the Legendary Dao Realm, and has also comprehended the third sequence of Dao rules to the Ten Percent Perfection Realm, and he only needs to comprehend the second sequence of Dao rules before he can impact the Mythical Dao Realm.

Knowing that Ye Xingchen's third-order supreme rules had been consummated, Ye Tian took out the only high-quality second-order supreme rules item he had found.

This high-quality second-order Dao rule item is called Xuanluo Stone, and after the identification of the Eye of Identification, it only needs the Heavenly Marrow Liquid plus the Dragon Scale Ancient Blood and the Bright Blood Marrow to get rid of its side effects.

"Xingchen, these items are for you, you take them to comprehend the second sequence of Supreme Dao rules items, and when you comprehend the second sequence of Supreme Dao rules, come to me again!"

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, father!"

Ye Xingchen immediately went to comprehend the rules of the second sequence of the Dao.

With the help of the Miluo Domain, Ye Xingchen spent tens of thousands of years in the Dao Era to successfully comprehend the rules of the second sequence of the Dao Dao.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian spent all kinds of resources to raise Ye Xingchen's supreme legendary body to the consummation realm, and then took out a legendary spiritual object.

This is the legendary spiritual object he found in the Legendary Bitter Sea, which can help Ye Xingchen break through to the Mythical Dao Realm 100%, and the effect is similar to that of the Ancient Yuan Fruit, but the legendary spiritual object also has the effect of permanently improving his understanding and improving his foundation.

Therefore, Ye Tiancai took out this legendary spiritual object and gave it to Ye Xingchen.

"Thank you, father!"

Ye Xingchen immediately went to the retreat to break through.

The years passed.

Tens of thousands of years after the Dao Era.

Ye Xingchen finally completed the breakthrough, and the legendary power in his body transformed into the power of mythology, breaking the bottleneck and becoming a mythical Dao realm.

And Ye Xingchen's breakthrough vision shocked the entire Human Domain, and naturally shocked the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

......

"It's the human realm again, hasn't the Ye Tian elder of the human realm already broken through? who else has broken through to the mythical Dao realm???

"I haven't heard that there is a powerful legend in the human realm to the Dao realm, why did you suddenly break through?"

"Strange, could it be Ye Tian's clone who broke through?"

"Impossible, Ye Tian's clone is refined, I've seen it before, it's already a mythical Dao realm, and there is no need to break through again!"

"That's weird!"

"Why don't you go and ask Elder Ye Tian!"

So, a group of elders asked Ye Tian in the Supreme Void.

And Ye Tian also appeared in the Supreme Void and said, "Everyone, it's me who has broken through the myth to the Dao realm!"

This announcement shocked all the patriarchs.

It's just that Ye Tian broke through to become a patriarch, what kind of person is Ye Tian's son, he has never heard of it, why did he suddenly become a mythical Dao realm and become a patriarch?
